name: Amazons
startIntroPart1: Greetings Amazon sister. Now that you have mastered your bioengineering skill, the day is come for you to take the infertile remnants of what's left of the Star Union, and terraform it into lush verdant forests, creating a brighter future for all life.
startIntroPart2: With spartan discipline the Amazons ride their beast into battle, seeking to replenish with life the whole universe by any means necesary.
declaringWar: Oh, my beloved trees slaughtered only to be consumed as fuel for their furnaces. Kin-sisters, let our arrows strike them as she grows forests to conceal us.
attacked: Listen carefully, Kin-Daughters. The day is come when our past oppressors return, Their ships invade our sacred spaces. Our time of peace is over.
defeated: We nurture all life. We were first to coax it from the fertile heart, to encourage it to fly, to sing. Embrace beauty.
introduction: Greetings, I assure you, I am no threat. Sure i will protect my offspring and discipline my children, but that's only because mother knows best.
neutralLetsHearIt: Let us see, what you had in mind.
neutralNo: I am sorry to say this isn't what we expected.
neutralYes: We will make a brighter future for both our colonys today..
hateHello: Our enemys will regret ever returning.
hateLetsHearIt: You better not be playing around.
hateYes: I hope this is the last time we agree on something.
afterPeace: We will forget our past disagreements
tradeRequest: This proposal will further the development for both our society's, more so on this foreing and unfamiliar planet.
denounced: The accusations of primitive lifeforms are beneath us.
declaringfriendship: We will make the world our paradise.
